action.reasoning: Observation: WiSE-FT hurt test performance (0.4161 vs 0.4651 baseline). Alpha=0.0 is optimal on val sweep. Val-to-test gap is ~12 points for Africa, indicating severe overfitting to val distribution. Analysis: Need better OOD generalization through (1) preserving pretrained features via lower backbone LR, (2) stronger regularization (higher dropout, random erasing), (3) SWA for flatter minima. Decision: Train new model 30 epochs with lower LR (1e-5 backbone), higher dropout (0.3), SWA from epoch 15, wider augmentation. Submit eval with SWA checkpoint.
